title: dubrueilia cuneiformis
intro: Dubrueilia cuneiformis, also known as Chinese Angelica, is a plant species in the carrot family native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-bacterial properties. The health benefits of Dubrueilia cuneiformis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
